Contents 
  1. Description

Interface Event

All Known Subinterfaces:
BackdropChangeEvent, CancellableEvent, InputEvent, KeyboardEvent, KeyboardEvent.KeyEvent, MouseEvent, MouseEvent.MouseButtonEvent, StageStateChangeEvent
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractCancellableEvent, BackdropChangeEvent.After, BackdropChangeEvent.Before, CloseRequestedEvent, KeyboardEvent.CharInputEvent, KeyboardEvent.KeyPressedEvent, KeyboardEvent.KeyReleasedEvent, KeyboardEvent.KeyRepeatedEvent, MessageEvent, MouseEvent.MouseClickedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseCursorMovedEvent, MouseEvent.MousePressedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseReleasedEvent, MouseEvent.MouseScrolledEvent, StageStateChangeEvent.StartEvent, StageStateChangeEvent.StopEvent, TickEvent
public interface Event
Marker interface for all events, like starting or keyboard/mouse events.

Events can also carry some useful info and are generally immutable. One of the exceptions is the cancelled flag in CancellableEvent, which can be changed once.
